name: Lagon
description: Lagon — Open-source JavaScript edge runtime for deploying serverless functions globally with V8 isolates.

seo.title: Lagon — Backend-as-a-Service
seo.meta_description: Lagon: Lagon — Open-source JavaScript edge runtime for deploying serverless functions globally with V8 isolates.

when_to_use: Open-source serverless JavaScript functions at the edge
V8 isolate-based edge compute without cold starts
Self-hosted Cloudflare Workers alternative on your infrastructure
Edge middleware for auth and routing with JS/TypeScript
Low-latency function execution near users at 50+ PoPs

pros: Open-source edge runtime with V8 isolates
review.verdict: Promising open-source edge runtime concept, but recent stagnation makes it a risky bet.
review.best_for: Teams wanting self-hosted Workers-like runtime for experimentation or edge POCs
review.not_for: Production workloads needing active vendor support and feature velocity

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Free / hobby tier; no peak-lock evidence.
